text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Motorcycle” has the meaning assigned by Section 502.001 (Definitions) and includes a motorcycle equipped with a sidecar.

(2) “Preferential lane” means a traffic lane on a street or highway where motor vehicle usage is limited to:

(A) buses;

(B) vehicles occupied by a minimum number of persons; or

(C) car pool vehicles.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 680. Misc. Provisions
##### § 680.011 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Motorcycle” has the meaning assigned by Section 502.001 (Definitions) and includes a motorcycle equipped with a sidecar.

    (2) “Preferential lane” means a traffic lane on a street or highway where motor vehicle usage is limited to:

        (A) buses;

        (B) vehicles occupied by a minimum number of persons; or

        (C) car pool vehicles.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

“Preferential lane” means a traffic lane on a street or highway where motor vehicle usage is limited to:
